album: Musique Fali – Nord Cameroun – Ocora SOR 9

tracks.titulo: A1 Friend, I’d like to accompany you to your grave - Funeral song
A2 Mimed narration of a war song against the Lakka in Kangu language
A4 Your bean leaves have a suspicious smell - Satirical song
A5 Love song about Daouniré, a chief’s daughter
B2 A girl from my family fell into a pit - Song of the Koumbandji warrior clan
B3 Why did you go up on the mountain ... - Satirical song
B5 Narration of the battle between FuriI and N'Goutchoumi
B6 Song for the birth of two twins
